projectList.title: AML-BET
projectList.description: The Acute Myeloid Leukemia Biomarker Evaluation Tool (AML-BET) was developed to expedite the process of biomarker evaluation for clinical researchers and biologists. Can be run or hosted anywhere with Docker.

projectList.title: Predicting mCRPC Subtypes
projectList.description: Machine learning models to predict the subtypes and progression of mCRPC RNA-Seq samples with over 87% accuracy. All code and data is property of Oregon Health and Science University's Xia Lab (pending publication).

projectList.title: Betty Media
projectList.description: An online movie rental service created as the final project for a software engineering course. Seamlessly integrates the PayPal API, allowing users to purchase, retain, and view movies from a MongoDB database and home server.

projectList.title: Local Pairwise Alignment
projectList.description: A small, robust Java program developed for a bioinformatics course. A dynamic programming matrix that compares two user-provided amino acid sequences and provides the optimal local alignment and the final alignment score.

projectList.title: D&D Combat Tracker
projectList.description: A small Java Swing application that handles Dungeons and Dragons combat flow. Developed to provide DMs a simple desktop program to keep track of their games, supporting two different styles of combat management.
